channel.title: Health-Wellness on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Health-Wellness on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Suicides more common in the U.S. than any time since World War II, CDC finds.
item.description:
Check out this article: Suicides more common in the U.S. than any time since World War II, CDC finds..

Note: Since this is an automatically created post there’s no commentary on it. Read it and do your own critical thinking. I may get around to adding some of my own thoughts or categorizing it… but maybe not.Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
